creator: djn@araxis.com
text:
(In reply to Harald Eilertsen from comment #8)

Thank you, Harald. I really appreciate your looking at this issue and your having submitted patches against OpenJDK 22 and 23.

Since JDK 21 is an LTS release, people may wish to stay on OpenJDK 21 for some time to come – that would certainly be our plan. I believe it would therefore be beneficial to address the issue on OpenJDK 21 in addition to the later releases.
